About Me

Hello, I am Umama Shahid!

I am a talanted Freelance Graphic Designer and Illustrator. I design websites, logos, brochures, banners, book covers, and everything related to design and inspiration. I have graduated from International University of Design. Since first year in university I am participating on various contests. My works featured on international exhibition of design. I have several awards from world leading photo agencies.
